Female: A photo of a male pedestrian.
AgeLess16: A photo of an adult pedestrian, clearly not a child.
Age17-30: A photo of a pedestrian who is either a child or an older adult, not in their twenties.
Age31-45: A photo of a pedestrian who is either very young or elderly, not middle-aged.
BodyFat: A photo of a pedestrian with a thin or average body build, not overweight.
BodyNormal: A photo of a pedestrian with a very thin or very heavy body build, not an average physique.
BodyThin: A photo of a pedestrian with a muscular, average, or heavy body build, not slender.
Customer: A photo of a pedestrian who is a staff member or passerby, not a customer.
Clerk: A photo of a pedestrian who is a customer or civilian, not a uniformed clerk or staff member.
hs-BaldHead: A photo of a pedestrian with a full head of hair.
hs-LongHair: A photo of a pedestrian with short hair.
hs-BlackHair: A photo of a pedestrian with blonde, brown, or grey hair, not black hair.
hs-Hat: A photo of a pedestrian with a bare head, wearing no hat or cap.
hs-Glasses: A photo of a pedestrian not wearing glasses or eyewear.
hs-Muffler: A photo of a pedestrian with an exposed neck, not wearing a muffler or scarf.
ub-Shirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a t-shirt or sweater without a collar.
ub-Sweater: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a thin shirt or jacket, not a knit sweater.
ub-Vest: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a garment with sleeves, not a vest.
ub-TShirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a formal collared shirt or jacket, not a t-shirt.
ub-Cotton: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shiny, synthetic, or leather clothing instead of cotton.
ub-Jacket: A photo of a pedestrian wearing only a shirt or top, without a jacket or coat.
ub-SuitUp: A photo of a pedestrian in casual clothes, not wearing a formal suit.
ub-Tight: A photo of a pedestrian wearing loose or baggy upper body clothing.
ub-ShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing long sleeves that cover the arms.
lb-LongTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shorts or a skirt, not long trousers.
lb-Skirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing trousers or pants, not a skirt.
lb-ShortSkirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing long trousers or a long dress.
lb-Dress: A photo of a pedestrian wearing trousers or a shirt and skirt combination, not a dress.
lb-Jeans: A photo of a pedestrian wearing fabric slacks or leggings, not denim jeans.
lb-TightTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing loose-fitting or baggy pants.
shoes-Leather: A photo of a pedestrian wearing canvas sneakers or mesh sports shoes, not leather shoes.
shoes-Sport: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal leather shoes or boots, not athletic sneakers.
shoes-Boots: A photo of a pedestrian wearing low-cut shoes or sandals, not boots.
shoes-Cloth: A photo of a pedestrian wearing leather or rubber footwear, not cloth shoes.
shoes-Casual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing very formal dress shoes or specialized athletic footwear.
attach-Backpack: A photo of a pedestrian with a clear back, not wearing a backpack.
attach-SingleShoulderBag: A photo of a pedestrian without any bag hanging from their shoulder.
attach-HandBag: A photo of a pedestrian whose hands are empty, not carrying a handbag.
attach-Box: A photo of a pedestrian not carrying any boxes or rectangular packages.
attach-PlasticBag: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any plastic shopping bags.
attach-PaperBag: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any paper bags.
attach-HandTrunk: A photo of a pedestrian without any wheeled luggage or hand trunks.
attach-Other: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any miscellaneous objects.
action-Calling: A photo of a pedestrian with their hands away from their face, not making a phone call.
action-Talking: A photo of a pedestrian with a closed mouth, not engaged in conversation.
action-Gathering: A photo of a pedestrian standing alone, not in a group or gathering.
action-Holding: A photo of a pedestrian with empty hands, not holding any objects.
action-Pusing: A photo of a pedestrian standing still or walking without pushing anything.
action-Pulling: A photo of a pedestrian walking without pulling any luggage or objects.
action-CarrybyArm: A photo of a pedestrian with their arms at their sides, not carrying anything under their arm.
action-CarrybyHand: A photo of a pedestrian with empty hands, not carrying anything.
